title: Filters
description: Standard filter bar pattern. DS inputs without labels, secondary Filtrar button, and two icon buttons: filter--add (blue) and filter--reset (red).
rules: Inputs: exact DS input tokens from inputs.json — no label, placeholder only, all flex:1.
Filtrar: secondary pill button — 32px height, body-small-bold font, 1px stroke, 0 16px padding.
filter--add: 32×32px button, border-radius:4px, 1px border + fill var(--b6). Icon 24px (4px padding).
filter--reset: 32×32px button, border-radius:4px, 1px border + fill var(--r6). Icon 24px (4px padding).
Filter bar spans full card width. Inputs share width equally with flex:1. Icon buttons flex-shrink:0.
pageUsage:
Renderer : renderers.filters(data)
Source   : sections/components/filters.json

In page templates:
  Text inputs  → DS input tokens from inputs renderer (height:32px · border-radius:6px)
  Dropdowns    → tblDemoTable structure: dt-drop-wrap / dtDrop() / dtPickOpt()
  Filtrar btn  → secondary button inline styles (see Buttons section)
  filter--add  → iconSvg('filter--add',  24, 'var(--b6)')  in 32×32px button
  filter--reset→ iconSvg('filter--reset', 24, 'var(--r6)')  in 32×32px button

Container wrapping filter bar + table:
  border-radius:8px · border:1px solid var(--n4) · background:#fff · padding:20px · gap:20px
